name: Fresh Premium Jackfruit
description: Whole, naturally ripened premium jackfruit. Sweet, aromatic, and directly harvested from our organic orchard.

name: Dehydrated Jackfruit Snacks
description: Crispy and naturally sweet dried jackfruit slices. A perfect healthy and chewy tropical snack with no added sugar.

name: Jackfruit Seed Powder
description: Finely ground organic jackfruit seed powder. Rich in protein and fiber, a great gluten-free supplement for baking.

name: Green Jackfruit (for Cooking)
description: Unripe green jackfruit chunks. The ultimate vegan meat alternative, perfect for savory curries, stews, and BBQ 'pulled pork'.

name: Jackfruit Pulp Juice
description: 100% pure jackfruit pulp juice. Refreshing, tropical, and packed with Vitamin C. No artificial flavors.

name: Jackfruit Leaf Tea Bags
description: Organic dried jackfruit leaf tea bags. Traditionally used for its potential blood sugar regulation benefits.

name: Peeled Jackfruit Pods (Ready to Eat)
description: Mess-free, expertly peeled sweet jackfruit pods. Packed in a sealed container for maximum freshness and convenience.

name: Jackfruit Blend Jam
description: A delightful blend of sweet mango and aromatic jackfruit pulp. Perfect spread for toast and pancakes.

name: Heavy-Duty Jackfruit Opener Knife
description: Specially designed sharp and sturdy knife with a comfortable grip for easily cutting through the tough skin of a whole jackfruit.

name: Jackfruit Insulated Bag (Small)
description: Keep your peeled jackfruit pods cool for up to 4 hours. Lightweight, leak-proof, and designed for convenience.

name: Jackfruitt Reusable Eco-Tote Bag (Large)
description: Extra-large and heavy-duty canvas tote bag. Ideal for carrying a whole heavy jackfruit or large fresh food orders.

name: Jackfruit Preparation Gloves
description: Textured nitrile gloves for peeling jackfruit. Effectively blocks the sticky 'sap' (latex) from sticking to your hands.
